decisions.question: How should tsuku exec work? Covers command semantics, ProjectVersionResolver implementation using LoadProjectConfig, fallback to binary index, relationship to existing tsuku run, and the exec flow for CI/scripts.

How should optional shim generation work? Covers shim architecture (where they live, what they contain), tsuku shim install/uninstall commands, update triggers, and the security model for shim-based auto-install in untrusted repos.
